name: Yaam Polami: Herbed Salad of Assorted Fresh Fruit
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Cup grapes, green and red, halved
1/2 Cup water chestnuts or jicama, sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve sugar and salt in lime juice.
2. Add chicken and shrimp to the mixture and stir well.
3. Set aside half portions of garlic, shallots, peanuts, chilies, and coriander for decoration.
4. Mix the remaining ingredients thoroughly.
5. Gently add all other ingredients to the mixture.
6. Sprinkle the reserved garlic, shallots, peanuts, chilies, and coriander on top before serving.
7. Use shredded orange as a container for serving.
Yield: 4 servings
